emails.subject: RE: EOL Amendment
emails.body: RE: EOL Amendment Kim: Sorry for the mixup. Attached is my redlined version of Stacy's form. Do we need to add references to crude? Sara

emails.subject: RE: EOL Amendment
emails.body: The decision that was made early on was that we were only going to tackle Gas and Power first. I am concerned that there may be other amendments that Stacy has sent to Mark which you may not have.... Kim

emails.subject: RE: EOL Amendment
emails.body: Attached is the list which I created when Mark left town on August 31. He sent a rash of emails to me (from Stacy) and I assigned per the list. I had Texaco on my list because he mentioned it to me in a voice mail. If there are any names missing from the list, let me know. Sara
